text: ASTORIA PRIMARY AND BEHAVIORAL HEALTH PRIMARY AND BEHAVIORAL HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides primary care and behavioral health care services. 2158 Exchange Street Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6:30pm (503) 338-4675 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 338-4675 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts Medicaid, Medicare, and private insurance. Discounts, financial assistance, and payment plans may be available for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Clatsop County Services: Community Clinics Community Mental Health Agencies General Medical Care Other Services Offered At This Location: SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - DIABETES EDUCATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
